titleStmt.title: SII 8.451: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 451. (A.R. No. 158 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE VIRRIRUNDA-PERUMAL TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhu vaṉaccakra vatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉThe stone containing this portion is lost: the probable syllables have been inserted.śrīvirapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1vatu parāntakavaḷanāṭṭu māṟamaṅkalamāṉa de ventiravallapaccaturveti
maṅkalattu tirumelkoyilil Aḻakiya pāṇṭiya viṇṇakar Emperumāṉ koyilil tiruvaṭipiṭi(y)kkum nampimāṟku Ivvemperumāṉukku Ivvūr paṟṟil paḻa
ntiruvuṭaiyāṭṭamāy varukiṟa Aḻavayalakattaṭi nilam Araiye nālumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻmukkaālum karuñcey nila muṉṟe nālumāvum
Āka karuñcey Uṭpaṭṭa nilam muṉṟe mukkāle muṉṟumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻmukkālukkuk kaṭamai Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum
taruvatāṉaaccum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikra- happeṟum vācaṟppeṟum Ilāñciṉaippeṟum taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai
yum taṭṭaḷipāṭṭamum Iṭaiyarvariyum Iṉavari poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭppaṭa Ivvemperumāḷukku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭ
ṭu veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkup patiṉoṉṟāvatu mutal tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭam Iṟaiyiliyākat tantom Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kalli
lum cem(cem)pilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu nāṉkellaikaḷilum tiruvāḻi(l)kkallum nāṭṭikkoḷka . Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu Innāḷ
8 10 1 . Ivai paḻantiparāyaṉ ṉeḻuttu . Ivai pallavarāyaṉ ṉeḻuttu .—
Digital edition of SII 8.451 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
